Glossary — Terms & Acronyms

Quick reference for the jargon, acronyms, and domain terms used throughout {{PROJECT_NAME}}'s wiki. Search or filter by category.

Category 1 Name

TermName — Full Name
Plain-English definition. What it is, why it matters, and optionally an analogy ("think of it as...").
AnotherTerm
Another definition. Keep definitions concise but accessible to newcomers.
